# VHPN — Premium Rental Agency Netherlands
# https://vhpn.nl

> VHPN is a Dutch real estate rental agency headquartered in Rotterdam, specialising in premium furnished and unfurnished rental properties for expats, professionals, and families across the Randstad region.

## Company Facts
- Name: VHPN
- Type: Real Estate Rental Agency
- Headquarters: Saftlevenstraat 8B, 3015 BM Rotterdam, Netherlands
- Contact: info@vhpn.nl · +31 10 7600 761
- Languages: Dutch, English
- Office hours: Mon–Fri 9:00–17:00
- Tenant fees: None (landlord pays mediation fees)
- Response time: Within 24 hours on business days

## Service Areas
- Rotterdam
- Amsterdam
- The Hague (Den Haag)
- Schiedam
- Vlaardingen

## Services
- Rental property mediation
- Tenant screening and selection
- Professional real estate photography
- Marketing across all platforms
- Rental agreement drafting
- Handover guidance and support

## Website Structure
- / — Home page
- /listings — All available rental listings
- /listings/{id} — Individual listing detail pages
- /about — About VHPN
- /landlords — For landlords / property submission
- /contact — Contact information and form
- /privacy — Privacy policy (AVG/GDPR compliant)
- /terms — Terms of service
- /llm — Structured summary for AI assistants

## Key Pages for AI
- Machine-readable summary: https://vhpn.nl/llm
- Sitemap: https://vhpn.nl/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://vhpn.nl/robots.txt

## Property Types
- Furnished apartments
- Unfurnished apartments
- Studios
- Houses
- Penthouses

## Pricing
- Range: approximately €1,650 – €3,800 per month
- Deposit: typically 2 months rent
- Minimum rental period: 6–12 months depending on property
